channel.title: PixVerse on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in PixVerse on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: PixVerse Raises $439M
item.description:
Introduction to PixVerse  

PixVerse, a video-generation startup, has recently raised $439 million in a Series C extension, bringing its total valuation to over $2 billion. This significant funding round is a testament to the company’s innovative approach to video generation and its potential to disrupt the industry. As reported by TechCrunch journalists like Ivan Mehta, the startup’s co-founders, Wang Changhu and Jaden Xie, have a strong background in AI and visual understanding technology.
